description_long: This object is a standard North American stop sign, featuring a red octagonal face with a white border and the word 'STOP' in bold, white uppercase letters at the center. The sign is mounted on a tall, perforated metal pole, which is painted dark gray and has a series of evenly spaced holes running vertically along its length. The front face of the sign is highly visible and likely made of reflective material to enhance nighttime visibility. The rear of the sign is plain red, with the mounting hardware and pole attachment visible. The sign is designed to be placed at intersections or road crossings to control vehicle and pedestrian traffic. Its construction suggests durability and weather resistance, suitable for long-term outdoor installation.
description: A red octagonal stop sign with white border and 'STOP' text, mounted on a tall, perforated metal pole. Designed for roadside use and high visibility.
description_view_0: The front view shows the red octagonal sign with a white border and bold white 'STOP' text, mounted on a dark gray pole.
description_view_1: The side view reveals the thin profile of the sign and pole, with the sign face barely visible.
description_view_2: The rear view displays the plain red back of the sign and the mounting hardware attaching it to the pole.
description_view_3: The opposite side view again shows the slim profile of the sign and pole, similar to view 1.
